summary.en: Uganda generally relies on adopted IEC and international EMC standards rather than a dedicated regional EMC directive. Motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies should not cause excessive electromagnetic disturbance and should have adequate immunity, with EMC evidence reviewed as part of the UNBS conformity and PVoC package. For cordless tools with radio functions, EMC also interacts with UCC radio rules.
summary.zh: 乌干达通常依赖采用的 IEC 和国际 EMC 标准，而非专门的区域 EMC 指令。电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源不应造成过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度，EMC 证据作为 UNBS 符合性和 PVoC 包的一部分审查。对具无线电功能的无绳工具，EMC 还与 UCC 无线电规则相关。
summary.zht: 烏干達通常依賴採用的 IEC 和國際 EMC 標準，而非專門的區域 EMC 指令。電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源不應造成過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度，EMC 證據作為 UNBS 符合性和 PVoC 包的一部分審查。對具無線電功能的無繩工具，EMC 還與 UCC 無線電規則相關。

standards_or_laws: Adopted IEC and CISPR EMC standards as referenced by UNBS
UNBS conformity assessment under the PVoC programme
Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) rules where radio functions are present

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and mains-voltage condition still need review against the IEC and CISPR limits referenced for Uganda and the UNBS conformity route.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及市电电压条件仍需对照乌干达引用的 IEC 和 CISPR 限值及 UNBS 符合性路径复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及市電電壓條件仍需對照烏干達引用的 IEC 和 CISPR 限值及 UNBS 符合性路徑覆核。

standards_or_laws: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is an EMC report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, or controller variants, or that was run at China 220 V rather than Uganda 240 V mains. The conformity file should reflect the exact marketed configuration and the IEC and CISPR limits referenced for the Uganda market, and route through UNBS PVoC.
gap.zh: 常见差距是 EMC 报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包或控制器变体，或在中国 220 V 而非乌干达 240 V 市电下完成。符合性文件应反映实际销售配置以及乌干达市场引用的 IEC 和 CISPR 限值，并通过 UNBS PVoC 路径办理。
gap.zht: 常見差距是 EMC 報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包或控制器變體，或在中國 220 V 而非烏干達 240 V 市電下完成。符合性文件應反映實際銷售配置以及烏干達市場引用的 IEC 和 CISPR 限值，並通過 UNBS PVoC 路徑辦理。

target.en: Conditional: EMC is enforced through UNBS conformity and the PVoC programme using adopted IEC and CISPR standards rather than a standalone Uganda EMC directive; for radio-enabled cordless tools, UCC rules also apply.
target.zh: 有条件：EMC 通过 UNBS 符合性和 PVoC 程序、采用 IEC 和 CISPR 标准执行，而非独立的乌干达 EMC 指令；对具无线电功能的无绳工具，还适用 UCC 规则。
target.zht: 有條件：EMC 通過 UNBS 符合性和 PVoC 程序、採用 IEC 和 CISPR 標準執行，而非獨立的烏干達 EMC 指令；對具無線電功能的無繩工具，還適用 UCC 規則。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but Uganda acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, mains condition, and UNBS conformity mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但乌干达接受性取决于范围、限值、配置、市电条件及 UNBS 符合性映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但烏干達接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置、市電條件及 UNBS 符合性映射。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Uganda-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system at the Uganda 240 V mains condition, is mapped to the adopted IEC and CISPR limits, and clears UNBS conformity through PVoC; radio-enabled tools also need UCC treatment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售工具系统、在乌干达 240 V 市电条件下完成、映射到采用的 IEC 和 CISPR 限值，并通过 PVoC 取得 UNBS 符合性之前，不能视为乌干达就绪；具无线电功能的工具还需 UCC 处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售工具系統、在烏干達 240 V 市電條件下完成、映射到採用的 IEC 和 CISPR 限值，並通過 PVoC 取得 UNBS 符合性之前，不能視為烏干達就緒；具無線電功能的工具還需 UCC 處理。
